Würth Elektronik lacks small-signal MOSFET portfolio. Available active components limited to bipolar transistors and protection diodes; no 60V-class N-channel MOSFETs in SOT-23 or SOT-323 packages exist in TAS.

objections: C36,C44,C57,C58,C73,C74,C78,C81: Original GRM155R70J105KA12D is 0402 (1.0×0.5mm), substitute 885012108005 is 1206 (3.2×1.6mm). Footprint area increased 16×, violating 'same or smaller' constraint.
warnings: C42,C61: Note claims package increase 0402→0603, but original CL10B103KA8NNNC is 0603; substitute 885012106022 is 0603. Verify cross-reference data accuracy.
C11,C66: Note claims package increase 0603→0805, but original CL21B106KPQNNNE is 0805; substitute 885012107013 is 0805. Verify cross-reference data accuracy.
C1,C3,C59,C63,C9,C18,C20,C21: Package size increased (0402→0603 or 0603→0805). Acceptable only if PCB layout density permits.

C47 (5.6nF), R3/R12/R26 (866Ω), R18/R19/R39 (16.5kΩ), R49 (10mΩ), Q1, Q2: No substitutes found. Verify these components are genuinely unavailable in target library and that original manufacturer parts can be procured for production.
review_verdicts.summary: Design rejected due to C36 series substitution changing capacitor package from 0402 to 1206 (16x area increase), violating footprint constraints. Electrical parameters for all other components are acceptable. Several data inconsistencies in package change notes require correction.

objections: C42,C61: Substitute PN 885012106022 is identical to C8,C106,C107 substitute, but C8 is 22µF while C42,C61 are 10nF (CL10B103KA8NNNC). Value mismatch of >2000×. A 22µF capacitor cannot substitute a 10nF capacitor in the same footprint.

C36,C44,C57,C58,C73,C74,C78,C81: Original GRM155R70J105KA12D is 0402 (1.0×0.5mm), not 0805 as claimed in notes. Substitution to 1206 (885012108005) represents a 3-step package increase (0402→1206), not 0805→1206. This requires explicit layout verification for every site.
Critical components Q1 (PSMN5R4-25YLDX), Q2 (2N7002K-T1-GE3), and R49 (10mΩ current sense) have no substitutes. Design cannot be fully populated with target manufacturer components.
warnings: C1,C3,C59,C63: Package increase 0402→0603 with voltage upgrade 10V→25V. Verify pad geometry compatibility.
C9,C18,C20,C21: Package increase 0603→0805. Verify footprint land patterns accommodate larger body.
C11,C66: Original CL21B106... is 0805, not 0603 as implied by '0603→0805' note. Verify substitute package size vs. original land pattern.
R3,R12,R26: No substitute for 866Ω (E96 value). Closest available 825Ω (-4.7%) may affect precision divider accuracy if used in feedback network.
R18,R19,R39: No substitute for 16.5kΩ (E96 value). Closest options 15.4kΩ (-6.7%) or 18kΩ (+9%) exceed 5% tolerance band.
review_verdicts.summary: Cross-reference report contains critical errors: C42/C61 substitute PN duplicates C8 (22µF) for 10nF application. Package size misidentified for C36 group (0402 original, not 0805). Additionally, power MOSFETs Q1/Q2 and current sense resistor R49 lack substitutes, preventing complete BOM translation. Report must be corrected before proceeding.

warnings: C1,C3,C42,C59,C61,C63: Package increase 0402→0603 requires layout verification (footprint larger than original)
C9,C18,C20,C21,C11,C66: Package increase 0603→0805 requires layout verification (footprint larger than original)
C36,C44,C57,C58,C73,C74,C78,C81: Package increase to 1206 requires layout verification (significant footprint increase from 0402/0805)
L1,L2: Substitute DCR 1.19mΩ vs original ~1.1mΩ (XGL6030-650MEC) — 8% higher conduction loss, verify thermal budget
Q1,Q2,R3,R12,R18,R19,R26,R39,R49,C47: No substitutes available — retain original components
review_verdicts.summary: Cross-reference review complete. All 43 components reviewed. 25 substitutions recommended (23 exact electrical matches, 2 within tolerance). 7 partial substitutions accepted with footprint increases. 9 components require original retention (6 unavailable in target library, 3 out of substitution scope). No electrical derating violations; all capacitor voltage ratings maintained or improved. Inductor DCR slightly increased. Verify PCB layout accommodates larger capacitor packages (up to 1206).

No suitable MOSFET candidate in target manufacturer library. Original specs: Vds=25V, Id=100A, Rds_on=5.4mΩ. Target library lacks high-current (100A+) low-voltage MOSFETs in compatible footprints. Available alternatives either insufficient current rating (>50% derating required) or excessive Rds_on (>2× original), violating conduction loss constraints.

No suitable small-signal MOSFET candidate in target manufacturer library. Original specs: Vds=60V, Id=300mA, Rds_on~2Ω. Target library lacks 60V-class small-signal MOSFETs in SOT-23 or equivalent footprint. Available alternatives insufficient voltage rating (<60V) or incompatible package.

No 10mΩ (0.01Ω) current sense resistor available in target library. Reviewed 15 candidates in _tas_candidates: values available are 1mΩ, 2mΩ, 5mΩ, 50mΩ, 100mΩ, 150mΩ, 200mΩ, 270mΩ, 330mΩ.
